title: Specify human tree root history buffer matching agent tree parity

artifacts.description: Add humanRootHistory[30] ring buffer, humanRootHistoryIndex counter, _pushHumanRoot() internal helper, and isKnownHumanRoot() public view function mirroring the existing isKnownAgentRoot() pattern. Call _pushHumanRoot() inside enrollHuman() after LeanIMT insertion.

Hardhat tests covering: (1) root present immediately after enrollment, (2) root survives up to 29 subsequent enrollments, (3) root evicted after 30 subsequent enrollments, (4) isKnownHumanRoot() reverts/returns false for zero root, (5) ring-buffer wrap-around at index boundary.

Add §7 Security Considerations subsection: 'Human Merkle Root Staleness Window'. Document 30-root history buffer, staleness bound (30 enrollments), expected throughput assumption for N-minute bound, and client retry guidance when proof verification fails due to stale root.
Note under replay/race-condition threat entries that human proofs now share the same 30-root window as agent proofs, eliminating the prior asymmetry that caused instant invalidation.

steps: Read contracts/src/IdentityRegistry.sol in full to locate existing agentRootHistory[30], agentRootHistoryIndex, _pushAgentRoot(), isKnownAgentRoot(), and enrollHuman() so the new code mirrors the exact pattern.
Declare `uint256[30] private humanRootHistory` and `uint256 private humanRootHistoryIndex` storage variables adjacent to their agent counterparts.
Implement `function _pushHumanRoot(uint256 root) internal` that stores root at humanRootHistory[humanRootHistoryIndex % 30] then increments humanRootHistoryIndex.

Implement `function isKnownHumanRoot(uint256 root) public view returns (bool)` iterating humanRootHistory[0..29] and returning true on match, false otherwise (same O(30) linear scan as agent variant).
Inside enrollHuman(), after the LeanIMT leaf insertion call, invoke `_pushHumanRoot(humanTree.root())` to record the new root.
Remove or correct the misleading contract comment 'humanTree uses Semaphore's [root history]' since humanTree is now a standalone LeanIMT with its own buffer.
Update verifyHumanProof() (or the handshake verifier) to call isKnownHumanRoot(publicSignals.humanMerkleRoot) instead of a direct root equality check, matching the agent proof verification path.
Write Hardhat test file covering the five scenarios listed in the test artifact: immediate presence, survival through 29 enrollments, eviction at enrollment 30, zero-root guard, and wrap-around.
Run `npm run test:contracts` and confirm all new and existing tests pass.

Add §7 subsection to spec/draft-bolyra-mutual-zkp-auth-01.md documenting the 30-root staleness window, throughput assumption (e.g. ≤1 enrollment/minute → ~30-minute window), and client retry guidance.
Update docs/owasp-agentic-mapping.md to note the eliminated human/agent asymmetry.
Commit with DCO sign-off: `git commit -s -m 'fix(contracts): add humanRootHistory[30] ring buffer matching agent tree parity'`.
dependencies: contracts/src/IdentityRegistry.sol — existing agentRootHistory pattern to mirror
LeanIMT library — humanTree.root() must be callable after insertion
Hardhat test suite — contracts/test/ must compile with updated ABI
spec/draft-bolyra-mutual-zkp-auth-01.md — §7 must exist or be created
